trial_dilution_risk.target_biology: Multi-biomarker informed treatment approach to spare gastroesophageal cancer patients from surgery
trial_dilution_risk.flawed_enrollment_criteria: Not explicitly detailed in transcript, but presented as a 'feasibility' study

key_data_gaps: No efficacy data presented; trial is just enrolling first patients

crispro_opportunity.description: The GLITZ trial aims to use a multi-biomarker approach to avoid surgery in gastroesophageal cancer, indicating a need for high-precision biomarker panels to ensure safety.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: AACR is launching a first-of-its-kind clinical study, which will assess the feasibility of using a multi-biomarker informed treatment approach to spare patients with gastroesophageal cancer from life-altering surgery.
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO's computational spine could optimize the multi-biomarker panel selection to increase the negative predictive value, ensuring patients spared from surgery are truly low-risk.

unresolved_questions: Whether a multi-biomarker approach is sufficiently sensitive to safely replace surgical intervention in gastroesophageal cancer.

vulnerability_identified.mechanistic_blindspot: Resistance mechanisms in cancers that do not yet respond to current checkpoint inhibitors
vulnerability_identified.unexplained_resistance_quote: Too many patients still do not benefit from available therapies.

crispro_opportunity.description: NCI is funding trials to make immunotherapy work for non-responders, creating a gap for precise resistance mapping.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: funding five active clinical trials to make immunotherapy work for cancers that do not yet respond.
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can identify the specific molecular drivers of non-response to define new combination partners for these NCI-funded trials.

cited_competitors.name: venetoclax
cited_competitors.context: Mentioned as a successful translation of programmed cell death research into clinic

cited_competitors.name: pembrolizumab
cited_competitors.context: Mentioned as a landmark success of NCI funding

unresolved_questions: How to make immunotherapy effective for the large population of non-responders.
